posts.author: leticiaggarcia (Letícia Goulart Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!
There’s no news that monday users loves the dark/night mode theme and the ID element view as well.
But when we combine this two together, the font color doesn’t follow the recommended color contrast.
For example:

night-mode1280×753 62.1 KB

My feedback is: synchronize the color fonts with the system theme.

Thanks again,
